response: Dear Team, As today marks my last day at GreenLeaf Solutions, I wanted to reach out with a heartfelt goodbye to every one of you who turned our daily work into a collaborative, joyful adventure rather than just a job. I’m especially grateful for your unwavering support during the Q4 eco-friendly product launch, where your quick thinking, late-night troubleshooting, and constant encouragement turned a potentially chaotic project into one of our company’s biggest recent wins. Next, I’m stepping into a role focused on sustainable supply chain consulting—a path I never would have felt confident pursuing without the skills and mentorship I gained from each of you here. I’d love to stay in touch, so please feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/maggielee) or shoot me an email at my personal address (maggie.lee@email.com) whenever you want to catch up, collaborate, or even just debate the best office coffee brand. Thank you again for everything, and I’m cheering for each of you and GreenLeaf’s continued success—here’s to crossing paths again soon, whether at an industry event or a casual coffee catch-up.
